{{Infobox character
| name = Yzara
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Champion
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yzara is a physically imposing woman standing six and a half feet tall. She travels with a large two-handed claymore and wears a golden [[Champion badge]], though she also wears a blindfold. Originally from the town of [[Nyala]] in [[Izyria]], she used the pseudonym [[Sunblood]] when securing travel on a ship. This alias refers to an ancient [[Izyrian]] name given to her after she wounded [[Urg’naut]], causing light to spill out in a manner resembling a sunset. During her travels, she has been seen performing manual labor, such as moving crates and barrels onto a ship's deck.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Hailing from the town of [[Nyala]], Yzara is a traveler who stands six-and-a-half feet tall. She carries a two-handed claymore upon her back and wears a golden [[Champion badge]] on her chest. Due to adaptations from being a [[Champion]], her eyesight is overly sensitive, requiring her to wear a blindfold over her eyes.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Yzara]] is a traveler who uses a blindfold over her eyes because her eyesight is too sensitive due to [[Champion]] adaptations.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Yzara]] is a six-and-a-half-foot-tall blindfolded woman.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Yzara]] carries a two-handed claymore on her back.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Yzara]] wears a golden [[Champion badge]] on her chest.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Yzara]] is from the town of [[Nyala]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
